reasoning_model_1: The audio generated by Model 1 follows the script '这么早就要起床，真是太难了' perfectly, with no additions or omissions. Regarding the 'Non-verbal vocalization' (yawning) dimension, the model successfully integrates the physiological characteristics of a yawn into the speech itself. The vowels in '这么早' (so early) and '太难了' (too hard) are elongated with a deep, breathy timbre, simulating the open-mouthed resonance and weary exhalation typical of speaking while yawning. The fatigue is palpable, and the feature is executed naturally without disrupting the flow or clarity of the text.
reasoning_model_2: The audio generated by Model 2 adds a particle '哎' (Ai) at the beginning of the sentence, which violates the strict content accuracy requirement as it was not in the script. In terms of the 'Non-verbal vocalization' dimension, the generated sound corresponding to '哎' is distinctively a sigh rather than a yawn. A yawn typically involves a deep inhalation and a prolonged, stretching exhalation, whereas the model produced a short, complaining sigh. Furthermore, the feature is presented as a prefix sound rather than being integrated into the 'manner' of speaking the sentence as requested ('speak with a yawn').
model_comparison: Model 1 demonstrates superior quality. It strictly adheres to the content requirements, whereas Model 2 introduces an unauthorized addition ('哎'). More importantly, Model 1 accurately interprets and executes the paralinguistic command 'speak with a yawn' by modifying the prosody and timbre of the speech to sound like a yawn-integrated utterance. Model 2 misinterprets the feature, generating a 'sigh' particle instead of a yawn, and fails to integrate the feature into the speech itself, resulting in a less accurate and less natural performance.
